funcbody:
func Default(method, contentType string) Binding {
	if method == http.MethodGet {
		return Form
	}

	switch contentType {
	case MIMEJSON:
		return JSON
	case MIMEXML, MIMEXML2:
		return XML
	case MIMEPROTOBUF:
		return ProtoBuf
	case MIMEMSGPACK, MIMEMSGPACK2:
		return MsgPack
	case MIMEYAML, MIMEYAML2:
		return YAML
	case MIMETOML:
		return TOML
	case MIMEMultipartPOSTForm:
		return FormMultipart
	default:
		return Form
	}
}
